prerequisites.value: Weapon Focus ( sling ) or weapon training (thrown) class feature, warslinger racial trait.

description.value: **Benefit:** You gain a +1 bonus on damage rolls made with all types of slings, and don’t provoke attacks of opportunity when reloading a sling. In addition, you treat all ranged and thrown weapons that have â sling â in their name as if they were slings for all feats and class abilities that require such weapons, as well as the warslinger racial trait.
